textPlain: This is not in fact a compositing window manager for Windows, but rather a port of a Mac app for WYSIWYG LaTeX editing. It looks like a very useful application. Just wish they prioritized porting it to Linux instead.
I'm sure there are some people who would prefer a graphical interface like this.
My guess is the point is personal exploration and edification, which is also the best reason I can think of to hack on stuff
